title: FiduciaCommon
description: Shared envelopes returned across the fiducia coordination API. Field names are snake_case to match the wire format exactly.

ProposeOutcome.title: ProposeOutcome
ProposeOutcome.description: Result of a committed write (lock/kv/election/discovery mutation).

shard.description: Shard whose Raft group committed the command.

log_index.description: Index assigned in that shard's log.

revision.description: State-machine revision produced by applying the command.

ProposeError.title: ProposeError
ProposeError.description: Why a write could not be committed.

leader.description: Current leader to retry against, when known (not_leader).

Introspection.title: Introspection
Introspection.description: Result of validating an API key (fiducia-auth). The edge/LB caches this.

valid.description: Whether the key is valid and active.
